name: groundlink-comms-planner
description: GroundLink — terrain-aware comms coverage and planning web app

scripts.deploy: gh workflow run deploy.yml --ref main && echo "Triggered the GitHub Pages deploy of main → https://johncheesy.github.io/Groundlink-comms-planner/ (watch with: gh run watch). Note: Pages publishes the latest main, not local uncommitted changes."
